source: Visual identity.pptx (theme1.xml + slide content), April 2026 snapshot

purple.role: Primary brand color. Use for: hero backgrounds, primary CTAs, logo (default), key headlines, brand impact moments. Most distinctive Winningtemp color.

light_purple.role: Secondary background. Use for: soft section backgrounds, content cards, subtle highlights. Pairs with purple text.

gray.role: Neutral background. Use for: large flat backgrounds, content separation, low-emphasis areas.

extended_purple_light.role: Very light purple wash. Use for: subtle dividers, table row banding, hover states.

wave.role: Freshness accent — USE SPARINGLY. For differentiating boxes on LIGHT backgrounds, growth arrows on charts, small accents. NEVER pair with Deep Purple #7F2696 background.

strict_rules.comment: Wave is an accent, not a layout color. Do NOT put Wave on Deep Purple — not as cards, not as accent bars, not as dividers, not as chart series. Use White or Light Purple instead on purple backgrounds.

red_warning.role: Warning / negative. Use ONLY for: error states, regression indicators, declining metrics, alerts. Never for decoration.
red_warning.note: Hex approximate — confirm against latest Visual identity.pptx if exact match required.

black.role: Primary text on light backgrounds. Default body color. Logo black variant.

white.role: Primary text on dark/purple backgrounds. Logo white variant. Card backgrounds on purple sections.

rules.wave_on_purple: FORBIDDEN — never pair Wave #C0DAD8 with Deep Purple #7F2696 background. Use White or Light Purple instead.
rules.comment: Body copy must be Black on light or White on dark. Other brand colors may appear in display headlines/expressive contexts only.
